images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunning Japanese idol‑style model, early twenties, flawless realistic skin with visible pores and faint vellus hair, large expressive eyes, a cute yet seducing face, a fit curvy silhouette—slim waist, ample bust—her straight black silky hair plastered wet and glossy from a recent shower, clinging to her neck. She wears a Korean prep‑school look: an oversized ivory button‑down shirt, left unbuttoned to show a delicate black lace bralette, a high‑waist pleated navy skirt, knee‑high white socks and polished black loafers. The abandoned factory interior glows with warm golden sunlight and a subtle monitor‑screen blue fill, creating bright, clear light while a shallow depth of field blurs the broken windows. She stares directly into the lens with intense, lazy‑sluggish eyes. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray‑traced lighting, global illumination, crisp bokeh.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese idol‑style influencer, age 20‑21, with flawless yet realistic skin (visible pores, faint vellus hair), large expressive eyes, a cute yet seductive face, and a fit, curvy silhouette (slim waist, ample bust). She wears a modern cheongsam — a sleek, form‑fitting silk‑blend dress with a high slit, delicate lace trim at the neckline, and a subtle sheer panel exposing a hint of midriff; the fabric clings to her curves, highlighting her waist and hips. She stands in an opulent reading corner lined floor‑to‑ceiling with dark‑wood bookshelves, the warm ambient glow of concealed floor lights casting a subtle upward “horror‑style” illumination that brightens her face and outfit, yet leaves no heavy shadows—sharp, high contrast, and crisply detailed. Shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, using a shallow depth of field for a creamy bokeh that renders the stacked books softly blurred, emphasizing her as the focal point. Global illumination and ray‑tracing techniques give the scene a luminous, cinema‑grade finish. Her gaze locks directly into the camera, eyes intense and slightly smoky, a confident half‑smile playing on her lips, as if sharing a secret with the viewer. The vibe is ultra‑luxury lifestyle, a seamless blend of high‑fashion sensuality and aspirational interior design.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a Japanese idol‑style model posing in a cozy reading nook with floor‑to‑ceiling bookshelves, the scene bathed in bright, dappled leaf‑light that filters through a nearby window and casts gentle, leaf‑patterned highlights onto her skin. She wears a simple, form‑fitting white tee made of soft, slightly translucent cotton that clings to her curves, revealing the delicate outline of a white lace cami underneath; paired with high‑waist straight‑leg denim jeans that hug her slim waist and accentuate her hips. Her straight, silky black hair waterfalls over her shoulders, and a shy smile plays on her lips as she gazes downwards, eyes large and expressive, cheeks tinted with a natural rosy flush. She gently turns the page of an open book, a candid, intimate moment that suggests interaction with the viewer. The background is softly blurred into a creamy bokeh of blurred book spines, creating a shallow depth of field. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, with precise depth of field, global illumination, ray‑tracing and a desaturated, muted color grade for a fresh, innocent vibe.8k photo, Large breasts
